heading: Information availability to and disclosure by Secretary
label: 1951 Information availability to and disclosure by Secretary

children.heading: Copy of final decree or order; other information; anonymity affidavit; exemption from Freedom of Information Act
children.label: a Copy of final decree or order; other information; anonymity affidavit; exemption from Freedom of Information Act

children.text: the name and tribal affiliation of the child;
the names and addresses of the biological parents;
the names and addresses of the adoptive parents; and
the identity of any agency having files or information relating to such adoptive placement.

children.heading: Disclosure of information for enrollment of Indian child in tribe or for determination of member rights or benefits; certification of entitlement to enrollment
children.label: b Disclosure of information for enrollment of Indian child in tribe or for determination of member rights or benefits; certification of entitlement to enrollment
children.text: Upon the request of the adopted Indian child over the age of eighteen, the adoptive or foster parents of an Indian child, or an Indian tribe, the Secretary shall disclose such information as may be necessary for the enrollment of an Indian child in the tribe in which the child may be eligible for enrollment or for determining any rights or benefits associated with that membership. Where the documents relating to such child contain an affidavit from the biological parent or parents requesting anonymity, the Secretary shall certify to the Indian child’s tribe, where the information warrants, that the child’s parentage and other circumstances of birth entitle the child to enrollment under the criteria established by such tribe.
